data_infrastructure.rationale: GCP with BigQuery and Looker dashboards shows early analytics infrastructure. Python pipelines exist but no data warehouse architecture or ML-ready feature store detected.

ml_ai_capability.rationale: No ML or AI roles or tools mentioned. Content ops is manual. No model serving infrastructure or ML tooling signals detected.

strategy_intent.rationale: Content ops bottleneck is an implicit AI opportunity but there is no explicit AI strategy language. Hiring a Content Operations Specialist instead of pursuing automation suggests low strategic intent.

operational_readiness.rationale: GCP deployment indicates cloud capability but no container orchestration or CI/CD signals. Startup scale limits infrastructure maturity.

composite_rationale: ShopStream scores 1.5 (Beginner) with early GCP/BigQuery infrastructure but no ML capability or AI strategy. The manual content ops bottleneck is a high-value automation target. The company has data but lacks the pipeline, tooling, and talent to act on it independently.
